formality.description: Bulgarian has a T-V distinction: Вие (Vie, formal/plural) vs ти (ti, informal/singular). Professional software uses Вие-form.

gender.inclusiveGuidance: Bulgarian has grammatical gender. When gender is unknown, masculine is the conventional default.

formal-vie.label: Вие (Formal)
formal-vie.description: Standard for professional software and business communication.
formal-vie.prompt: Formal Bulgarian. Use Вие-form for second-person address. Professional register for software interfaces.

informal-ti.label: Ти (Informal)
informal-ti.description: For consumer apps, social media, and casual contexts.
informal-ti.prompt: Informal Bulgarian. Use ти-form. Conversational tone for consumer products.
